generated_parts.label: Avionics Bay Mock Tray
generated_parts.spec: Avionics_bay educational tray with board_standoff, harness_passthrough, connector labels, EMI shield mock, no ordnance or flight computer authority

requirements.role: Avionics ring/tray with board mounts and harness pass-throughs
pass_features: good: Battery, sensor, actuator, cartridge, payload, cable, or joint modules remain removable without full teardown.
good: Harnesses, tubes, or service channels are routed through visible raceways or protected channels.
good: Access is represented by geometry: hatch, pocket, channel, fastener pattern, slot, window, or removable cover.
good: Every cable exit shows strain relief geometry (clamp, grommet, tie point) and routing respects a stated minimum bend radius away from moving joints and sharp edges.
good: Connectors are reachable without disassembling structure, have finger/tool clearance, and mention keying or labeling to prevent mis-mating.

risk.mit: Ensure proper shielding and grounding of all electronic components.

risk.mit: Add strain relief clamps at every cable exit point.

risk.mit: Label all connectors clearly and provide visual guides for correct mating.
